ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code of the airport */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport in feet */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the airport */,
  "dst" TEXT /* Daylight Saving Time (DST) status */,
  "tz_database_time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone database name */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the airport (e.g., airport, helipad) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., OurAirports) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the airport data was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the airport (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Entity or organization that owns the airport */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the airport */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the airport */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the airport */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runways" (
  "runway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each runway */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport the runway belongs to */,
  "runway_name" TEXT /* Name of the runway */,
  "length_feet" INTEGER /* Length of the runway in feet */,
  "width_feet" INTEGER /* Width of the runway in feet */,
  "surface" TEXT /* Surface type of the runway */,
  "lighted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the runway is lighted */,
  "closed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the runway is closed */,
  "le_ident" TEXT /* Identifier of the runway's left end */,
  "le_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the runway's left end */,
  "le_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the runway's left end */,
  "le_elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the runway's left end in feet */,
  "he_ident" TEXT /* Identifier of the runway's right end */,
  "he_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the runway's right end */,
  "he_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the runway's right end */,
  "he_elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the runway's right end in feet */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Last date the runway was inspected */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the last inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last date the runway was maintained */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Next date when maintenance is due */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status (e.g., up to date, overdue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("runway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runways_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "navigation_aids" (
  "nav_aid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each navigation aid */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport the navigation aid belongs to */,
  "nav_aid_type" TEXT /* Type of the navigation aid (e.g., VOR, NDB) */,
  "frequency_khz" INTEGER /* Frequency of the navigation aid in kHz */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the navigation aid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the navigation aid */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the navigation aid in feet */,
  "ident" TEXT /* Identifier of the navigation aid */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the navigation aid */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Last date the navigation aid was inspected */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the last inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last date the navigation aid was maintained */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Next date when maintenance is due */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status (e.g., up to date, overdue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nav_aid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_navigation_aids_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport the facility belongs to */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of the facility (e.g., terminal, fuel station) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility within the airport */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the facility */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Last date the facility was inspected */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the last inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last date the facility was maintained */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Next date when maintenance is due */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status (e.g., up to date, overdue) */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* Operational hours of the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the facility (e.g., number of passengers, vehicles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., airport manager, pilot, air traffic controller) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the airport data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the airport data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device type (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport where the maintenance was performed */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the maintenance was performed (if applicable) */,
  "runway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the runway where the maintenance was performed (if applicable) */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activities */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "completed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who completed the maintenance */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of completion for the maintenance */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual date of completion for the maintenance */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_runway_id FOREIGN KEY ("runway_id") REFERENCES runways ("runway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)
